notes: Equations (15)-(17) were transcribed from Markdown OCR and normalized for notation.
The sign convention for the velocity/money-demand shock in the CRRA money-demand equation should be checked against the PDF or author source before review promotion.
The implementation cross-check confirms the Rep-MMB variant uses the separable CRRA linear system.
